name: How to File Forklift Injury Claim in West Jordan UT

mainEntity.name: Process to file forklift accident claim in West Jordan UT Labor Commission?
mainEntity.text: Process to file forklift accident claim in West Jordan UT Labor Commission?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. Report to employer day-of. 2. Seek medical care. 3. File Form 221A online/mail within 180 days. 4. Attend med exam. 5. Dispute denial via mediation/hearing within 1 year.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah Labor Commission's online portal simplifies filing, but carriers request independent exams to dispute causation. West Jordan claims spike in summer; gather forklift black box data, maintenance logs early. Attorney handles paperwork, negotiates higher settlements avoiding common 30% insurer cuts.
